channel.title: Alignment on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Alignment on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: LLM Engineering (11): Safety and Alignment
item.description:
Safety has the worst signal-to-noise ratio of any topic in LLM engineering. There’s a lot of philosophy, a lot of marketing, and not a lot of engineering specifics. This chapter is the engineering specifics: what RLHF actually optimizes when it talks about “safety,” how refusal calibration breaks, what red-teaming looks like in practice, and the hallucination measures that actually predict customer impact.

What “alignment” actually means in 2026

The term collapsed three things that should be separate:
